Document:
# Core Rule 6 - Blackout Policy
Called the New Life Rule on most servers. With respect to roleplay, the Blackout Policy dictates what your character will and will not remember in post-death scenarios. These rules are in place to help attempt to make the playing field as fair as possible for all players.
With respect to death and revival, there are some expectations on how much round time you can remember. The method of revival will help determine what you will remember. We'll start with the most restrictive memory requirements up to the least restrictive.
To ensure cohesion between mechanics and in-character RP, as well as to account for antagonists who have revivals built into their kits, antags do not have a limit to their post-death memory.
Method
Memory Limit
Cloning
Your memory is completely wiped, as if it were roundstart.
Normal revival/defibrilation
Anything up to small details of your death, but not identity of the murderer
Healed from critical condition
You may remember anything that happened to you if you have not died.
Brain on MMI
Treated as: Normal revival
Antagonist Revivals
No limit.
